summary: Successfully tested the Partner Orgs page fix. The core bug was that /admin/partner-orgs page file was missing - now the new partner-orgs.tsx correctly displays linked organizations, their stores, and has a working 'Create Account' button with modal that calls POST /api/admin/stores with partner_id.
critical_code_review_comments: partner-orgs.tsx correctly parses URL params id and name from /admin/partner-orgs?id={partnerId}&name={partnerName}
GET /api/admin/partners/{id}/orgs correctly returns linked organizations with _id, name, slug fields
POST /api/admin/stores correctly accepts partner_id field and stores it with the new store
The Create Account modal has all required fields: Account Name (required), Phone, City, State
data-testid attributes present on key elements for testing
StoreCreate model in models.py line 147 now includes partner_id: Optional[str] = None
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary stores with TEST_ prefix and clean up after completion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Orgs page fix verified. The white-label.tsx 'Orgs' button navigates to /admin/partner-orgs?id={partnerId}&name={partnerName}. The new partner-orgs.tsx page: (1) Loads and displays orgs linked to the partner via GET /api/admin/partners/{id}/orgs, (2) Shows stores under each org via GET /api/admin/stores?organization_id={id}, (3) Has Create Account button that opens modal with name/phone/city/state fields, (4) Modal calls POST /api/admin/stores with organization_id and partner_id, (5) Has Link Organization functionality. All backend APIs working correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/admin/partners: PASS - Returns Calendar Systems and Test Partner with all required fields
backend_api.GET /api/admin/partners/{id}/orgs: PASS - Returns linked orgs for Test Partner (1 org), empty for Calendar Systems
backend_api.POST /api/admin/partners/{id}/assign-org: PASS - Assigns org to partner, returns 404 for invalid partner
backend_api.POST /api/admin/stores: PASS - Creates store with partner_id field correctly
backend_api.GET /api/admin/stores?organization_id={i: PASS - Returns stores for specific organization

frontend_ui.White Label Partners page loads: PASS - Shows Calendar Systems and Test Partner with Sold Workflow badges
frontend_ui.Partner Orgs page displays: PASS - Shows partner name, linked org with store count, list of stores
frontend_ui.Create Account button visible: PASS - Blue button with + icon at bottom of org card
frontend_ui.Create Account modal opens: PASS - Shows New Account title, form fields for name/phone/city/state, Cancel and Create buttons
frontend_ui.Create Account form submission: PASS - Successfully created TEST_Playwright_Store_456 in Seattle, WA
frontend_ui.Store appears in list after creation: PASS - Org account count increased from 4 to 5
